Currently{value_0}In mode.Please specify the corresponding log file (Client.txt).

1. To open the settings screen, either right-click on the "Settings" option in the menu, or click the ⚙️ button in the upper right corner.

   - {value_1}Log file

ぽえなびを気に入っていただけたら、応援いただけると嬉しいです。\nいただいたサポ:

今回のバージョンから、各エリアのガイドデータは\n編集できない仕様に変更しました:
Starting with this version, the guide data for each area will be
The specifications have been changed to prevent editing.
(This is to ensure that the automatic update feature of PoENavi functions correctly.)
However, each area can have its own area notes added.

We would appreciate it if those who previously edited the guide could
From the JSON file in the old "PoENavi" folder,
Please copy the necessary information into the area notes for each area.

Going forward, I will save official guides and area notes separately.
Future updates will ensure that area notes are never lost.

実際のレイアウトは、ワールドマップ上の隣接エリアとの位置関係に依存してランダムに:
The actual layout randomly varies depending on its position relative to the adjacent area on world map.
As a result, the layout may be rotated either vertically or horizontally, or it may appear as if it has been rotated 90 degrees.
